FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Settlement Cost Change
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Changes settlement costs to be primarily based on distance, and adds resource costs as well.

patchNoteLines.li: Settlement costs are based on distance instead of number of settlements in the empire
After founding a configurable number of settlements (default 3), further settlements require resources in addition to silver

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Performance Improvement
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Improves performance of the new distance-based settlement cost calculations.

patchNoteLines.li: Uses caching to cut down on pathfinding checks

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Update create new settlement UI
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Some updates to the complex-mode create new settlement UI.

patchNoteLines.li: Updates the additional complex-mode-only window in the create new settlement UI

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Distance fixes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: If there are no Empire settlements, then the distance calculations fall back onto one of the player's active maps.

patchNoteLines.li: Uses player's map for distance-based calculations if no Empire settlements exist

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Route drawing fix
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Small change to world-map route drawing.

patchNoteLines.li: Routes between settlements on different planet layers are no longer drawn
Bugfix: routes between settlements in orbit were drawn on the planet's surface instead

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Slider Bugfix
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Fixes an issue where settlement sliders at max could produce constant ticking noises.

patchNoteLines.li: Bugfix: settlement sliders set to max can produce constant drag-sliding noises

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Route Rendering Fixes
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: A few fixes for routes between orbital settlements.

patchNoteLines.li: Makes orbital routes a little brighter and thicker
Orbital routes will only render when the orbital layer does

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Route rendering change
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Minor change to route rendering on the world map.

patchNoteLines.li: Always draw selected routes and labels when the route's associated layer is being rendered
